_meta.purpose: Provenance + decision record for the confirmed-Bali F&B CHAIN outlets from the KORA prospects list. Staging only — NOT ingested by the data-ops compiler (kept outside data/data-ops/batches/).
_meta.research_pass: 2026-07-19 (web research via WebSearch, two parallel passes)
_meta.publish_mechanism: migrations 0041 (insert @review) + 0042 (flip @published), applied manually to prod Supabase by the founder
_meta.guardrails: no invented content; addresses web-verified; official/instagram links left null where a handle could not be verified; chains framed honestly as reliable/everyday, not hidden finds; jobs from the canonical set; prices as bands

included.name: Toko Kopi Tuku
included.address: Jl. Raya Puputan No. 10, Renon, Denpasar Selatan, Kota Denpasar, Bali 80234
included.source: Kompas 2025-10-09 (Tuku's first Bali store, 65th outlet nationally, Renon); corroborated by Bali Portal News + on-the-ground Threads post
included.notes: Cult Jakarta neighbourhood coffee brand; signature Es Kopi Susu Tetangga.

included.name: Gildak
included.address: Jl. Tukad Gangga No. 10X, Renon, Denpasar Selatan, Kota Denpasar, Bali 80226
included.source: PatroliPost (4th Bali Gildak outlet); active official Facebook 'Gildak Tukad Gangga Renon'
included.notes: Nikmat Group Korean street food (corndogs, tteokbokki).

included.name: Sate Khas Senayan
included.address: Beachwalk Shopping Center, Level 1 #E-22, Jl. Pantai Kuta, Kuta, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361
included.source: Beachwalk official mall directory (unit L1 #E-22); GoFood; Tripadvisor
included.notes: Sarirasa Group; one of several Bali outlets, this is the confirmable flagship.

included.name: Bakso Boedjangan
included.address: Jl. Raya Kampus Unud, Jimbaran, Kec. Kuta Selatan, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361
included.source: baksoboedjangan.id store locator + RadarBali/JawaPos (national outlet #61, opened 2025-05-30)
included.notes: CRP Group. Chose the Jimbaran outlet over the Kuta (Bypass Ngurah Rai No. 11H) one, which one aggregator flagged possibly-closed; a Denpasar outlet at Jl. Imam Bonjol No. 440 also exists.

included.name: Fore Coffee
included.address: Jl. Raya Kampus Unud No. 18-109, Jimbaran, Kec. Kuta Selatan, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361
included.source: Multiple Bali directory/news sources; other confirmed Bali outlets: Icon Bali Mall (Sanur), Simpang Enam & Sesetan (Denpasar), Mahendradata
included.notes: Large active Indonesian specialty-coffee chain; signature Aren (palm sugar) Latte.

held.detail: Delivery-focused rice-box outlet (Canggu, Jl. Bantan Kangin No. 8). Live on GoFood/GrabFood but directory data is 2022-23; 2026 dine-in operating status not independently reconfirmed. Weak fit for a decision/moment guide.
Dessert-box brand, Denpasar (Jl. Mahendradatta No. 78C), opened 2021. Listing + social persist but 2026 status not reconfirmed; delivery/dessert-box orientation.

Delivery-only cloud kitchens, not dine-in venues. No source firmly confirms a specific Bali kitchen actively operating in 2026 after outlet consolidation; delivery-app listings can persist after closure. Also fails the 'right place for the moment' dine-in premise.

Permanent Pererenan location reported (Le Bajo, Jl. Babadan No. 89) via Tripadvisor + @kurasubali IG, distinct from the Tanah Gajah Ubud resort pop-up ending ~2026-05-08. Some 2025 sources called it a summer pop-up, so permanence still carries slight ambiguity — hold until reconfirmed, then can be added under district 'canggu' (Pererenan).
